headline: OpenClaw's ChatGPT moment sparks concern that AI models are becoming commodities
summary: At Nvidia's GTC conference this week, CEO Nvidia Jensen Huang dedicated a major part of his keynote to OpenClaw, a technology that didn't exist six months ago.
